name: Tidewater Coleslaw
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, blend the mayonnaise, vinegar, sugar, celery seed, and salt and pepper to taste.
2. Mix well until combined.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cabbage and carrots.
4. Pour the dressing over the mixture.
5. Blend well to ensure all vegetables are coated with the dressing.
6. Refrigerate until serving time.
